name: Taskforce 141
description:
Hear me out cake with the boys

Not my best work, but I’m going through some shit and I’m out of pre-made well done bots so here you go, please enjoy nonetheless

This is my first time writing more than one character into the bot, please be patient

UPDATE:

Hey so I found out why this bot sucks, lol
I went to edit it after someone complained about the repetition, and none of the characters have personality and there is no example dialogue, so I guess that just decided to take a vacation and die overseas? Oh well, here's the updated version, hopefully it's better
creator: MISA MISA
